infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Life Design reads health data (sleep, heart rate, HRV, steps, and activity) to surface cross-domain insights connecting your health to other areas of your life.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Life Design does not write health data.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Life Design uses motion data to estimate your activity level as part of your fitness dimension.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Life Design uses your voice to detect tone and sentiment during optional voice check-ins. Audio is processed on-device and raw recordings are never uploaded.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Life Design needs microphone access to record optional voice check-ins. Audio is processed on-device only.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Life Design reads your calendar to analyse work patterns such as meeting hours and focus blocks. Event titles and descriptions are never stored.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Life Design can optionally read reminders to surface task-completion patterns in your growth dimension.
